mapper.insert:
insert into rankplayer (roleId, name, guildFlag, career, createTime, createSid, level, levelUpTime, fightPower, horseId, horseFightPoint, wingId, beWorshipedNum,exp,wingFightPoint,equipWashPer,equipStrengthenLv,equipFightPower,gemFightPower,gemLv,magicWeaponDamage, talismanFightPower,magicFightPower,weaponFightPower,strengthenFightPower,charm,offlineEfficiency,sendFlower,shihai, arenaRank, topHallFightPower, universeFightPower, equipStar, equipStarGradeNum, equipAllStar, petFightPower,spiritFightPower,immEquipFightPower,consumeGold,intimacy) values ( #{roleId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{guildFlag, jdbcType = BOOLEAN}, #{career, jdbcType = TINYINT}, #{createTime, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{createSid, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{level, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{levelUpTime, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{fightPower, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{horseId, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{horseFightPoint, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{wingId, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{beWorshipedNum, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{exp, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{wingFightPoint, jdbcType = INTEGER}, #{equipWashPer, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{equipStrengthenLv, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{equipFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{gemFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{gemLv, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{magicWeaponDamage, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{talismanFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{magicFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{weaponFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{strengthenFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{charm, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{offlineEfficiency, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{sendFlower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{shihai, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{arenaRank, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{topHallFightPower, jdbcType= BIGINT}, #{universeFightPower, jdbcType= BIGINT}, #{equipStar, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{equipStarGradeNum, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{equipAllStar, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{petFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{spiritFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{immEquipFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{consumeGold, jdbcType= INTEGER}, #{intimacy, jdbcType= INTEGER}
)
mapper.update: update rankplayer set career = #{career, jdbcType = TINYINT}, name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, guildFlag = #{guildFlag, jdbcType= BOOLEAN}, createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType = BIGINT}, createSid = #{createSid, jdbcType = INTEGER}, level = #{level, jdbcType = INTEGER}, levelUpTime = #{levelUpTime, jdbcType = INTEGER}, fightPower = #{fightPower, jdbcType = BIGINT}, horseId = #{horseId, jdbcType = INTEGER}, horseFightPoint = #{horseFightPoint, jdbcType = INTEGER}, wingId = #{wingId, jdbcType = INTEGER}, beWorshipedNum = #{beWorshipedNum, jdbcType = INTEGER}, exp = #{exp, jdbcType = BIGINT}, wingFightPoint = #{wingFightPoint, jdbcType = INTEGER}, equipWashPer=#{equipWashPer, jdbcType= INTEGER}, equipStrengthenLv=#{equipStrengthenLv, jdbcType= INTEGER}, equipFightPower=#{equipFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, gemFightPower=#{gemFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, gemLv=#{gemLv, jdbcType= INTEGER}, magicWeaponDamage=#{magicWeaponDamage, jdbcType= INTEGER}, talismanFightPower=#{talismanFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, magicFightPower=#{magicFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, weaponFightPower=#{weaponFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, strengthenFightPower=#{strengthenFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, charm=#{charm, jdbcType= INTEGER}, offlineEfficiency=#{offlineEfficiency, jdbcType= INTEGER}, sendFlower=#{sendFlower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, shihai=#{shihai, jdbcType= INTEGER}, arenaRank=#{arenaRank, jdbcType= INTEGER}, topHallFightPower=#{topHallFightPower, jdbcType= BIGINT}, universeFightPower=#{universeFightPower, jdbcType= BIGINT}, equipStar=#{equipStar, jdbcType= INTEGER}, equipStarGradeNum=#{equipStarGradeNum, jdbcType= INTEGER}, equipAllStar=#{equipAllStar, jdbcType= INTEGER}, petFightPower=#{petFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, spiritFightPower=#{spiritFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, immEquipFightPower=#{immEquipFightPower, jdbcType= INTEGER}, consumeGold=#{consumeGold, jdbcType= INTEGER}, intimacy=#{intimacy, jdbcType= INTEGER} where roleId = #{roleId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from rankplayer where roleId = #{roleId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
